# Premier General Surgeons

> Board-certified general, bariatric, trauma, laparoscopic, and wound care surgery serving Brownsville, Harlingen, and the Rio Grande Valley, Texas. Bilingual care (English / Español). Two office locations. Phone: (956) 621-4981.

Premier General Surgeons, PLLC is a physician-led surgical practice in South Texas. Our surgeons provide minimally invasive (laparoscopic) and open surgery for a wide range of general-surgery, bariatric (weight-loss), and breast conditions. Offices in Brownsville (4970 Frontage Rd., Suite A, TX 78526) and Harlingen (5505 S Expressway, Ste 301, TX 78550).

## Core service hubs
- [General Surgery](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/general-surgery.html): Gallbladder, hernia, appendix, colon, and reflux/hiatal hernia surgery — minimally invasive and open options.
- [Weight Loss](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/weight-loss.html): Surgical and non-surgical (medical) weight loss, plus candidate evaluation.
- [Breast Cancer Surgery](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/breast-cancer-surgery.html): Oncoplastic and breast-conserving surgical care.

## Weight-loss services
- [Am I a Candidate for Bariatric Surgery?](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/am-i-a-candidate-for-bariatric-surgery.html)
- [Gastric Sleeve](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/gastric-sleeve.html)
- [Gastric Bypass](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/gastric-bypass.html)
- [Medical Weight Loss](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/medical-weight-loss.html)

## Breast surgery
- [Oncoplastic Lumpectomy](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/oncoplastic-lumpectomy.html)
- [Breast-Conserving Surgery](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/breast-conserving-surgery.html)
- [Skin-Sparing & Nipple-Sparing Mastectomy](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/skin-nipple-sparing-mastectomy.html)
- [Aesthetic Flat Closure After Mastectomy](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/aesthetic-flat-closure-mastectomy.html)
- [Scar-Minimizing Breast Surgery](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/scar-minimizing-breast-surgery.html)
- [Mastectomy Scar Revision](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/mastectomy-scar-revision.html)
- [Breast Reconstruction Coordination](https://premiergeneralsurgeon.com/breast-reconstruction-coordination.html)
